[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011110 4
1 0000000 a
2 0110001 3
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 1010010 3
7 1111111 a

01 10 0101101 4
12 21 0111111 6
23 32 1100111 5
34 43 1111110 6
45 54 1000111 4

70 07 1100011 4

71 17 1001110 4

61 16 1111111 a match 7
72 27 1110001 4
